tagline: You can now skip individual cells when running multiple cells in a notebook using the %skip magic command.
what_it_does: You can now skip individual cells when running multiple cells in a notebook using the %skip magic command. Add %skip at the beginning of any cell you want to skip. You can run a Databricks notebook interactively, one cell or many at a time, or schedule it to run automatically as a job.
why_it_matters: The advice notices provide information that can assist you in improving the performance of workloads, reducing costs, and avoiding common mistakes.
plain_summary: You can now skip individual cells when running multiple cells in a notebook using the %skip magic command. Add %skip at the beginning of any cell you want to skip.
key_takeaway: You can now skip individual cells when running multiple cells in a notebook using the %skip magic command.
